title: Astral
description: Origins addon and supplementary mod for Astral SMP.
body:
Astral is a supplementary mod and origins addon intended to be used with Astral SMP.

Currently, the mod provides the following changes to vanilla gameplay:
- Cactus, nether wart, and sugar cane can be bone-mealed.
- Pet parrots can be healed with seeds.
- Mobs grow drastically stronger as you venture further away from spawn.
- Modded armor sets may now support more than two layers.
- Items may now contain the NBT tag `SetGlint` to force enchantment glint to be enabled or disabled.
- Lightning bolts may now contain the NBT tag `PreserveItems` to prevent them from destroying ground items.

It also adds the following powers / actions / conditions to origins:
- `astral:modify_scale`, which is used to control the size, motion, and reach of a player.
- `astral:repeat`, which allows any action to be repeated multiple times.
- `astral:moon_phase`, which checks the current phase of the moon.
- `astral:distance`, which checks the entity's distance from a position (because the Origins implementation crashes our server lol).

Astral *also* adds the following content:
- Dyed amethyst blocks and clusters.
- A "randomizer" redstone block, which, when powered, outputs a random comparator signal.
- Cloud fluff and cotton, as well as cotton candy.
- A set of dye-able armor that gives either jump boost or slowness depending on how wet it is.
- A mirror (used in one of the server's origins).
- A data-driven currency system with random rewards and automatic item exchanging.
- A number of custom item models.
